title: More label colors and ability to change text color
excerpt: We need a color wheel or RGB pallet options because the 40 colors are not enough. Also, we need the ability to change the text color inside the labels/cells because if you use brighter colors such as yellow, light blue o…

posts.author: baylorpeak (Baylor)
posts.cookedHtml: We need a color wheel or RGB pallet options because the 40 colors are not enough. Also, we need the ability to change the text color inside the labels/cells because if you use brighter colors such as yellow, light blue or light green, the text gets washed out with the background color.
